fields.text: Appearance
White Dye + Torso Armor/Helm/Shield/Weapon -> White item.
Black Dye + Torso Armor/Helm/Shield/Weapon -> Black item.
Misc item + Scroll of Identify -> change its inventory graphic.
Quests & Portals
Staff of Kings + Amulet of the Viper -> Horadric Staff
Khalim's Flail + Khalim's Heart + Khalim's Eye + Khalim's Brain -> Khalim's Will
Wirt's Leg -> Portal to The Secret Cow Level
3 Pandemonium Keys -> Portal to Matron's Den/Forgotten Sands/Furnace of Pain (Random)
3 Demon's Ears -> Portal to Tristram (Pandemonium Finale)
Twisted Essence of Suffering + Charged Essence of Hatred + Burning Essence of Terror + Festering Essence of Destruction -> Uber Keys
3 Twisted Essence of Suffering -> Charged Essence of Hatred
3 Charged Essence of Hatred -> Burning Essence of Terror
3 Burning Essence of Terror -> Festering Essence of Destruction
3 Festering Essence of Destruction -> Twisted Essence of Suffering
Potions
3 Rejuvenation Potions -> Full Rejuvenation Potion
Strangling Gas Potion + Healing Potion (Any) -> Antidote Potion
Charsi's Malus + Gheed's Fortune -> 3 MF Potions
El + Standard Gem -> Rejuvenation Potion
Repair & Recovery
Ort Rune + Weapon -> Fully Repaired Weapon
Ral Rune + Armor -> Fully Repaired Armor
Ort Rune + Chipped Gem (Any) + Weapon -> Fully Repaired and Recharged Weapon
Ral Rune + Flawed Gem (Any) + Armor -> Fully Repaired and Recharged Armor
Utilities & Special Recipes
6 Perfect Gems (1 of each type) + Magic Amulet -> Prismatic Amulet
Magic Ring + Standard Ruby + Healing Potion -> Garnet Ring

Magic Ring + Standard Topaz + Rejuvenation Potion -> Coral Ring
Magic Ring + Standard Emerald + Antidote Potion -> Jade Ring
Axe (Any) + Dagger (Any) -> Throwing Axe
3 Magic Rings -> Magic Amulet
3 Magic Amulets -> Magic Ring
2 Unique Jewelry -> Standard of Heroes
3 Prime Sigils -> Gull Dagger
4 Prime Sigils -> Tarnhelm

2 Thaw for Modifiers Charm
3 Thaw for Level Reward Charm

Key of Destruction + Thawing Potion -> Pandemonium Key

20 Bricks + Thawing Potion -> Vex Rune
